meaning: n.十六,七世纪的小型有键乐器adj.处女的,无瑕的
examples: She was dressed in virginal white.
Somehow she'd always been a child in his mind, pure and virginal.
This angelic laser begins slowly the gradual process of transforming the virginal human body to the essence of the soul itself.
The paintings of women in white bring far greater complexity to this virginal vision of womanhood.
Someone will dress up as Millard Fillmore and parrot the former president's praise of this once virginal river.
